mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO VX_FollowUserList(id, follow_user, createTime) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.followUser}, GETDATE())
mapper.select:
SELECT f.follow_user AS followUser, d.name AS name, d.position AS position, d.mobile AS mobile, dept.name AS mainDepartment, f.createTime AS createTime FROM VX_FollowUserList f LEFT JOIN VX_DepartmentMembersList d ON f.follow_user = d.userid LEFT JOIN VX_DepartmentList dept ON dept.departId = d.main_department
AND d.name LIKE '%' + #{name} + '%'
AND d.mobile LIKE '%' + #{mobile} + '%'
AND dept.name LIKE '%' + #{mainDepartment} + '%'
ORDER BY f.createTime DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM VX_FollowUserList f LEFT JOIN VX_DepartmentMembersList d ON f.follow_user = d.userid LEFT JOIN VX_DepartmentList dept ON dept.departId = d.main_department
AND d.name LIKE '%' + #{name} + '%'
AND d.mobile LIKE '%' + #{mobile} + '%'
AND dept.name LIKE '%' + #{mainDepartment} + '%'
